items.title: Clásico kits: Barcelona, Real Madrid's all-time be...
items.summary: El Clásico is a clash of two of the world's most recognizable teams, Barcelona and Real Madrid. Both have iconic kits and shocking shirts in their closets.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Eala rallies past Fręch in gritty Italian Open opener
items.summary: Alex Eala fought back in the deciding set to claim a first round win over Magdalena Fręch at the Italian Open.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
